zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Wishart於1323年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾普倫德雷斯時，她的父親George William Wishart of Plenderleith29歲，母親Alice De Erskine41歲。她於1338年與George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖享年17歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia Wishart于1323年出生在苏格兰洛包爾普倫德雷斯时，她的父亲George William Wishart of Plenderleith29岁，母亲Alice De Erskine41岁。她于1338年与George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1340年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖享年17岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wishart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (eastern and central Scotland): of Norman origin, from the Anglo-Norman French form, Wischard, of the Old French personal name Guiscard. This was formed in Normandy from the Old Norse elements vizkr ‘wise’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, bold’ (or possibly the Old French suffix -ard).

variants.name: Wishard
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Wishart  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Wisehart
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German Weisshardt, from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wīs ‘wise’ + hart ‘strong, hard’.
Perhaps an altered form of Scottish   Wishart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Wishart was born in 1323, in Plenderleith, Roxburghshire, Scotland, her father, George William Wishart of Plenderleith, was 29 and her mother, Alice De Erskine, was 41. She married George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun in 1338, in Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1340, in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 17, and was buried in Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Wishart est née en 1323, à Plenderleith, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, George William Wishart of Plenderleith, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice De Erskine, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun en 1338, à Haddington, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1340, à East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 17 ans, et a été enterrée à Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia Wishart 1323 in Plenderleith, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George William Wishart of Plenderleith 29 und ihre Mutter Alice De Erskine 41. Sie hat 1338 in Haddington, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 17 Jahren in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun nel 1338, nel Haddington, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Wishartが1323年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアプレンダーレイスで生まれた時，父George William Wishart of Plenderleithは29歳，母Alice De Erskineは41歳であった。1338年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンハッドイントンでGeorge Abernethy 4th of Saltounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアエアスト サルトウンで17歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland, United: 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우
ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Wishart(이)가 1323년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 플렌델레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George William Wishart of Plenderleith(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice De Erskine(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1338년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 하딩턴에서 George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 이스트 살토우에서 17세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Wishart nasceu em 1323, em Plenderleith, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, George William Wishart of Plenderleith, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Erskine, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun em 1338, em Haddington, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1340, em East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 17 anos, e foi sepultada em Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.Saltoun, East Lothian, Scotland, United: уппир тоун оф салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Wishart родилась в 1323 г. в местности плендирлит, роксбургшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени George William Wishart of Plenderleith было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Erskine, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun в 1338 г. в местности хаддингтон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности эаст салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 17 лет и была похоронена в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia Wishart nació en 1323, en Plenderleith, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, George William Wishart of Plenderleith, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice De Erskine, tenía 41 años. Se casó con George Abernethy 4th of Saltoun en 1338, en Haddington, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1340, en East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 17 años, y fue sepultada en Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
